name: study-pulse
description: Study Pulse — plataforma colaborativa universitaria (monorepo backend + frontend)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
